title: Solo Leveling
author: Chugong
description: In a world where hunters, humans who possess magical abilities, must battle deadly monsters to protect the human race from certain annihilation, a notoriously weak hunter named Sung Jinwoo finds himself in a seemingly endless struggle for survival.

title: One Piece
author: Eiichiro Oda
description: Monkey D. Luffy sets off on a journey to find the legendary One Piece treasure and become the King of the Pirates.

title: Demon Slayer
author: Koyoharu Gotouge
description: Tanjiro Kamado's journey to become a demon slayer and find a cure for his sister Nezuko, who was turned into a demon.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
author: Gege Akutami
description: Yuji Itadori swallows a cursed finger and becomes the host of Ryomen Sukuna, the King of Curses.

title: Tower of God
author: SIU
description: A boy named Bam enters a mysterious tower to find his best friend Rachel.
